title: The Forbidden Forest Opens
description: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy, Conis. Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I apologize for causing you trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Cons-San, Cons-San! You too come try some!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I had friends who were pirates, too.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I regretted having to part with him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, when we almost had peace...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I apologize... everything came to nothing...

summary: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
